site.title: Congo
site.subtitle: A graduation sale where buyers guess the price before they unlock it.
site.defaultDescription: Furniture and computer supplies for sale before graduation. Browse the goods, guess the price to unlock a deal, and schedule pickup or delivery by email.
site.sharingTagline: Guess the price. Unlock the deal.
site.deliveryNote: Orders above $50 qualify for free local delivery.
site.pickupNote: Pickup details are coordinated by email after checkout.

items.name: Inland CAT6 UTP Cable, 2-Pack, 10ft
items.description: Two 10ft CAT6 RJ45 Ethernet cables (black and blue), bare copper, still sealed in original packaging.
items.pickupNotes: Small item, easy to bundle with other computer supplies.
